name: Cocoa Mix II
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Mix well until fully combined.
3. Store the mixture in an airtight container.
4. To serve: Scoop 1/3 cup of mix into a cup.
5. Add 1 cup boiling water to the cup and stir until dissolved.
6. Optionally, add a cinnamon stick to each serving for flavor enhancement.
7. Makes approximately 5 cups of cocoa mix.
